scripts.build: node -e "if(require('fs').existsSync('.env')) require('fs').copyFileSync('.env', 'apps/web/.env')" && npx turbo run build
scripts.dev: node -e "if(require('fs').existsSync('.env')) require('fs').copyFileSync('.env', 'apps/web/.env')" && npx turbo run dev
scripts.db:generate: node -e "if(require('fs').existsSync('.env')) require('fs').copyFileSync('.env', 'packages/database/.env')" && npx turbo run db:generate
scripts.db:push: node -e "if(require('fs').existsSync('.env')) require('fs').copyFileSync('.env', 'packages/database/.env')" && npx turbo run db:push
scripts.db:seed: node -e "if(require('fs').existsSync('.env')) require('fs').copyFileSync('.env', 'packages/database/.env')" && npx turbo run db:seed
scripts.setup: docker-compose up -d db && npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed
